title: The Cavern Dimension
description: Adds a use for the portal in Ancient Cities and a spooky new dimension.
body:
Minecraft fabric mod for 1.19 to add a use for the portal found in ancient cities. Full functionality is not yet implemented as this project is in beta currently. Also adds compressed deepslate, a slightly tougher version of cobbled deepslate.

Craft the Echo Igniter with an echo shard and a flint, and make sure there's no sculk veins blocking the portal.
